Team | Builders of Energy & AI Infrastructure | ON.energy
A global team tackling the world’s toughest power problems—combining engineering, software, and finance to make energy resilient and affordable.

{{We’re builders}}—shaping what comes next in energy and AI infrastructure. Ambition and innovation are at our core. ON's team spans continents and disciplines, united by a shared passion for solving the toughest power problems in the world so that we can make energy resilient, clean, abundant and affordable.

At ON, we’re focused on building the backbone of the new energy landscape with grid-safe, reliable systems that support the end user and the grid. The next standard for resilience will come from those who connect to the grid fast and connect responsibly. Our teams build and run systems that keep hospitals online, data flowing, and cities powered.
We trust our team. Autonomy isn’t freedom from responsibility; it’s the ability to act fast and get it right. We hire for judgment, expect ownership, and measure success in resiliency and uptime.

Curiosity fuels progress. You’ll be surrounded by a community that helps one another and works in cross-functional teams, composed of the brightest minds in technology, product engineering, finance, and more.
We move fast, debate hard, and learn from each other. If you want predictable, this isn’t it. If you want impact, welcome.

CEO & Co-Founder of ON.energy, Alan has scaled the company into a billion-dollar, multinational energy-technology platform, deploying gigawatts of storage across AI data centers, critical infrastructure, and grid assets.
Ricardo leads ON.energy's technology vision, developing patented microgrid control systems, the AI.UPS™️ platform, and the ON.command ™️ energy management system powering gigawatt-scale deployments.
David drives asset deployment, project financing, and capital and strategy, having deployed hundreds of millions to build and operate ON.energy's long-term contracted portfolio.

Andrea leads corporate finance, reporting, treasury, and trade finance at ON.energy, driving operational readiness at public-company standards and building the financial infrastructure to support gigawatt-scale growth.

Dax leads hyperscale deployments for ON.energy, leveraging nearly 20 years of experience scaling energy storage companies delivering multi-gigawatt projects, and building high-performing technical teams.

Over more than 50 years as a founder, entrepreneur, and service-company operator in energy technology, Norman has built deep expertise across oil and gas, renewables, and battery storage. He brings a proven record of deploying complex equipment and delivering highly skilled field services throughout the Americas, grounded in a steadfast commitment to operational excellence and a customer-first culture of top-tier performance.

Jose Manuel has brought his experience managing larger teams in complex industrial and service companies in Mexico. He is tasked with managing a talented workforce across half a dozen countries in Latin America from a hub in Mexico City.
